rulings.Case Title: MAHER PATEL VS. MORNING SUN CAPITAL LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 08, 2018, Line 1. DEFENDANTs LEGION CORPORATION, JOSEPH SHELLEY, FRANCOIS DE LA ROCHA's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Motion to Quash is DENIED as to Defendants Legion Corporation and Joseph Shelly because Plaintiff properly served parties through substitute service. Motion to Quash as to Defendant Francois De La Rocha is GRANTED because it is unclear whether Plaintiff properly served him. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN A. LEVENTINI VS. MEAGAN MIELKE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Meagan Mielke Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings On The Second Cause Of Action Of Plaintiffs John A Leventini And Heather A Leventini First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 08, 2018, Line 3. DEFENDANT MEAGAN MIELKE's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings GRANTED. Counsels to address whether the motion should be granted with or without leave to amend and why Defendant is not required to commence an unlawful detainer action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GIBSON CANITES VS. YEVA, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Complaint In Intervention
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 08, 2018, Line 4. INTERVENOR KAREN LUM's Motion For Leave To File Complaint In Intervention GRANTED. No opposition filed. The proposed plaintiff in intervention has met her burden under Code of Civil Procedure section 387. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHUNG KING LAW VS. LYZANN POBRE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 08, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANT FRANCISCA POBRE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Defendant has 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges causes of action for unlawful detainer, forcible entry and forcible detainer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KIRAN THAKOR VS. SALEH ALI MOHAMED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 08, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANT SALEH MOHAMED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Plaintiff properly pleaded and noticed an unlawful detainer action arising under Code Civil Procedure section 1161, subdivision (4). = (501/REQ)
